name: Chocolate Covered Marshmallows (Microwave Recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chocolate chips and shortening in a 2-cup measure.
2. Microwave at 50% or Medium for 1 to 3 minutes, or until the chips are shiny and soft. Stir until smooth.
3. Insert a toothpick into the top of each marshmallow.
4. Dip each marshmallow into the chocolate to cover completely.
5. Set the marshmallows on wax paper.
6. Let stand until firm.
Variation: For added flavor, dip the marshmallows in coconut, nuts, or candy sprinkles while the chocolate is still soft. This makes a great treat for parties.
